stench.name: Stench
stench.description: By releasing a stench when the Pokémon deals damage with its moves, there is a 10% chance that targets will flinch. This does not stack with moves or items that have a chance to flinch.

drizzle.name: Drizzle
drizzle.description: Summons rain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

speedBoost.name: Speed Boost
speedBoost.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat at the end of every turn.

battleArmor.name: Battle Armor
battleArmor.description: Hard armor protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

sturdy.name: Sturdy
sturdy.description: If the Pokémon has full HP and takes damage from a move that would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit with 1 HP. The Pokémon is also immune to one-hit KO moves.

damp.name: Damp
damp.description: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves. Explosive Abilities also fail to trigger.

limber.name: Limber
limber.description: The Pokémon’s limber body prevents it from being paralyzed.

sandVeil.name: Sand Veil
sandVeil.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in a sandstorm. The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms if it would otherwise.

static.name: Static
static.description: The Pokémon is charged with static electricity, when the Pokémon is hit by a contact move the attacker has a 30% chance of being paralyzed.

voltAbsorb.name: Volt Absorb
voltAbsorb.description: Electric-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore ¼ of its max HP.

waterAbsorb.name: Water Absorb
waterAbsorb.description: Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore ¼ of its max HP.

oblivious.name: Oblivious
oblivious.description: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated or falling for taunts, and is unaffected by Intimidate.

compoundEyes.name: Compound Eyes
compoundEyes.description: The Pokémon’s compound eyes boost the accuracy of its moves by 30%.

insomnia.name: Insomnia
insomnia.description: The Pokémon’s insomnia prevents it from becoming drowsy or being put to sleep.

colorChange.name: Color Change
colorChange.description: The Pokémon’s type becomes the type of the move used on it.

immunity.name: Immunity
immunity.description: The Pokémon’s immune system prevents it from being poisoned or badly poisoned.

flashFire.name: Flash Fire
flashFire.description: If hit by a Fire-type move, the Pokémon absorbs the flames and uses them to power up its own Fire-type moves by 50%.

shieldDust.name: Shield Dust
shieldDust.description: Protective dust shields the Pokémon, making it immune to additional effects from attacks.

ownTempo.name: Own Tempo
ownTempo.description: The Pokémon sticks to its own tempo, preventing it from becoming confused and is unaffected by Intimidate.

suctionCups.name: Suction Cups
suctionCups.description: The Pokémon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it intimidates opposing Pokémon and makes them cower, lowering their Attack stats.

shadowTag.name: Shadow Tag
shadowTag.description: The Pokémon steps on the opposing Pokémon’s shadows to prevent them from fleeing or switching out.

roughSkin.name: Rough Skin
roughSkin.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, its rough skin damages the attacker equal to ⅛ of their max HP.

wonderGuard.name: Wonder Guard
wonderGuard.description: Its mysterious power only lets supereffective moves hit the Pokémon.

levitate.name: Levitate
levitate.description: The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to Ground-type moves, as well as Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web.

effectSpore.name: Effect Spore
effectSpore.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being poisoned, paralyzed, or put to sleep.

synchronize.name: Synchronize
synchronize.description: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, poisoned, or badly poisoned by another Pokémon’s move or Ability, that Pokémon will also be inflicted with the same status condition. If this Pokémon is your lead into battle, opposing wild Pokémon will share its nature.

clearBody.name: Clear Body
clearBody.description: The Pokémon’s stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

naturalCure.name: Natural Cure
naturalCure.description: The Pokémon’s status conditions are cured when it switches out of battle.

lightningRod.name: Lightning Rod
lightningRod.description: The Pokémon draws in all Electric-type moves. These moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Sp. Atk stat.

sereneGrace.name: Serene Grace
sereneGrace.description: Doubles the likelihood of additional effects occurring when the Pokémon uses its moves. This does not affect items.

swiftSwim.name: Swift Swim
swiftSwim.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in rain.

chlorophyll.name: Chlorophyll
chlorophyll.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

illuminate.name: Illuminate
illuminate.description: By illuminating its surroundings, the Pokémon ignores changes to targets’ evasiveness and its accuracy cannot be lowered. If this Pokémon is your lead into battle, it raises the likelihood of double battles.

trace.name: Trace
trace.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it changes its Ability to match that of an opponent.

hugePower.name: Huge Power
hugePower.description: Doubles the power of the Pokémon’s physical moves.

poisonPoint.name: Poison Point
poisonPoint.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

innerFocus.name: Inner Focus
innerFocus.description: The Pokémon’s intense focus prevents it from flinching when attacked and is unaffected by Intimidate.

magmaArmor.name: Magma Armor
magmaArmor.description: The Pokémon’s hot magma coating prevents it from being frozen.

waterVeil.name: Water Veil
waterVeil.description: The Pokémon’s water veil prevents it from being burned.

magnetPull.name: Magnet Pull
magnetPull.description: Prevents Steel-type Pokémon from fleeing by pulling them in with magnetism.

soundproof.name: Soundproof
soundproof.description: Soundproofing gives the Pokémon full immunity to all sound-based moves.

rainDish.name: Rain Dish
rainDish.description: The Pokémon has ¹⁄₁₆ of its max HP restored at the end of every turn in rain.

sandStream.name: Sand Stream
sandStream.description: Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

pressure.name: Pressure
pressure.description: Puts opposing Pokémon under pressure, causing them to expend 1 more PP when using moves against the Pokémon.

thickFat.name: Thick Fat
thickFat.description: The Pokémon is protected by a layer of thick fat, which halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

earlyBird.name: Early Bird
earlyBird.description: The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokémon.

flameBody.name: Flame Body
flameBody.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being burned.

runAway.name: Run Away
runAway.description: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

keenEye.name: Keen Eye
keenEye.description: The Pokémon’s keen eyes ignores changes to targets’ evasiveness and its accuracy cannot be lowered.

hyperCutter.name: Hyper Cutter
hyperCutter.description: The Pokémon’s prized, mighty pincers prevent other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities from lowering its Attack stat.

pickup.name: Pickup
pickup.description: The Pokémon may pick up an item another Pokémon used during a battle, even if it did not participate.

truant.name: Truant
truant.description: Each time the Pokémon uses a move, it spends the next turn loafing around.

hustle.name: Hustle
hustle.description: When the Pokémon uses physical moves, its Attack stat is boosted by 50%, but its accuracy is lowered by 20%.

cuteCharm.name: Cute Charm
cuteCharm.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of becoming infatuated if the attacker and the Pokémon are of opposite genders.

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: The Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 50% if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

minus.name: Minus
minus.description: The Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 50% if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

forecast.name: Forecast
forecast.description: The Pokémon transforms with the weather to change its type to Water, Fire, or Ice.

stickyHold.name: Sticky Hold
stickyHold.description: The Pokémon’s held items cling to its sticky body and cannot be stolen or removed by other Pokémon.

shedSkin.name: Shed Skin
shedSkin.description: The Pokémon has a 30% chance to cure its own status conditions at the end of every turn by shedding its skin.

guts.name: Guts
guts.description: The Pokémon is so gutsy that when it has a status condition, its Attack stat is boosted by 50%. Being burned does not halve the damage dealt by the Pokémon’s physical moves.

marvelScale.name: Marvel Scale
marvelScale.description: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its marvelous scales boost its Defense stat by 50%.

liquidOoze.name: Liquid Ooze
liquidOoze.description: The strong stench of the Pokémon’s oozed liquid damages attackers that use HP-draining moves instead of healing them.

overgrow.name: Overgrow
overgrow.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Grass-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to ⅓ or less of its max.

blaze.name: Blaze
blaze.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Fire-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to ⅓ or less of its max.

torrent.name: Torrent
torrent.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Water-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to ⅓ or less of its max.

swarm.name: Swarm
swarm.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Bug-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to ⅓ or less of its max.

rockHead.name: Rock Head
rockHead.description: The Pokémon will not lose HP due to recoil damage from its moves.

drought.name: Drought
drought.description: Summons harsh sunlight for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

arenaTrap.name: Arena Trap
arenaTrap.description: Prevents opposing Pokémon from fleeing from battle. If this Pokémon is your lead into battle, it raises the likelihood of double battles.

vitalSpirit.name: Vital Spirit
vitalSpirit.description: The Pokémon is full of vitality, and that prevents it from becoming drowsy or being put to sleep.

whiteSmoke.name: White Smoke
whiteSmoke.description: The Pokémon is protected by its white smoke, which prevents its stats from being lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

purePower.name: Pure Power
purePower.description: Using its pure power, the Pokémon doubles the power of its physical moves.

shellArmor.name: Shell Armor
shellArmor.description: A hard shell protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

tangledFeet.name: Tangled Feet
tangledFeet.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s evasiveness if it is confused.

motorDrive.name: Motor Drive
motorDrive.description: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Electric-type moves. Instead, its Speed stat is boosted.

rivalry.name: Rivalry
rivalry.description: The Pokémon’s competitive spirit boosts the power of its moves by 25% against targets of the same gender, and lowers it by 25% against targets of the opposite gender. The power remains the same as usual if either Pokémon’s gender is unknown.

steadfast.name: Steadfast
steadfast.description: The Pokémon’s determination boosts its Speed stat when it flinches.

snowCloak.name: Snow Cloak
snowCloak.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasiveness by 25% in snow or hail. The Pokémon takes no damage from hail if it would otherwise.

gluttony.name: Gluttony
gluttony.description: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP drops to ¼ or less of its max, it will instead eat that Berry when its HP drops to ½ or less of its max.

angerPoint.name: Anger Point
angerPoint.description: The Pokémon is angered when it takes a critical hit, and that maxes its Attack stat.

unburden.name: Unburden
unburden.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat when its held item is consumed or lost.

heatproof.name: Heatproof
heatproof.description: The Pokémon’s heatproof body halves the damage taken from burns and Fire-type moves.

simple.name: Simple
simple.description: Doubles the effects of the Pokémon’s stat changes.

drySkin.name: Dry Skin
drySkin.description: Restores ¼ of the Pokémon’s max HP when hit by Water-type moves or ⅛ of the its max HP at the end of every turn in rain. However, the Pokémon receives 25% more damage from Fire-type moves and loses ⅛ of its max HP at the end of every turn in harsh sunlight.

download.name: Download
download.description: The Pokémon compares an opposing Pokémon’s Defense and Sp. Def stats before raising its own Attack or Sp. Atk stat — whichever will be more effective.

ironFist.name: Iron Fist
ironFist.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s punching moves by 20%.

poisonHeal.name: Poison Heal
poisonHeal.description: If poisoned or badly poisoned, the Pokémon has ⅛ of its max HP restored at the end of every turn instead of losing HP.

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.description: Boosts the power of moves of the same type as the Pokémon by 100% instead of 50%. Does not stack with the Stellar-type Tera boost.

skillLink.name: Skill Link
skillLink.description: The Pokémon’s multistrike moves always hit the max amount of times.

hydration.name: Hydration
hydration.description: Cures the Pokémon’s status conditions at the end of every turn in rain.

solarPower.name: Solar Power
solarPower.description: In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 50% but it loses ⅛ of its max HP at the end of every turn.

quickFeet.name: Quick Feet
quickFeet.description: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Speed stat is boosted by 50%. Being paralyzed does not lower the Pokémon’s Speed stat.

normalize.name: Normalize
normalize.description: All the Pokémon’s moves become Normal type. The power of those moves is boosted by 20%.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s critical hits by 125% instead of 50%.

magicGuard.name: Magic Guard
magicGuard.description: The Pokémon takes damage only from attacks.

noGuard.name: No Guard
noGuard.description: The Pokémon employs no-guard tactics to ensure incoming and outgoing attacks always land. If this Pokémon is your lead into battle, it raises the likelihood of double battles.

stall.name: Stall
stall.description: The Pokémon’s moves go last among moves of the same priority.

technician.name: Technician
technician.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 50% if their power is 60 or less.

leafGuard.name: Leaf Guard
leafGuard.description: The Pokémon is immune to status conditions in harsh sunlight.

klutz.name: Klutz
klutz.description: Items do not work when held by the Pokémon.

moldBreaker.name: Mold Breaker
moldBreaker.description: The Pokémon’s moves are unaffected by the Ability of the target, with certain exceptions.

superLuck.name: Super Luck
superLuck.description: The Pokémon is so lucky that the critical-hit ratios of its moves are boosted by one stage.

aftermath.name: Aftermath
aftermath.description: When the Pokémon is knocked out by a contact move, the attacker takes damage equal to ¼ of their max HP.

anticipation.name: Anticipation
anticipation.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it senses whether the opponents know any one-hit KO moves or moves that are super effective against it.

forewarn.name: Forewarn
forewarn.description: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can tell one of the moves an opposing Pokémon has.

unaware.name: Unaware
unaware.description: The Pokémon ignores the target’s stat changes when attacking, and ignores the attacker’s stat changes when being attacked. It cannot ignore changes to the Speed stat, however.

tintedLens.name: Tinted Lens
tintedLens.description: The Pokémon’s "not very effective" attacks deal double damage.

filter.name: Filter
filter.description: Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective moves by 25%.

slowStart.name: Slow Start
slowStart.description: For five turns, the Pokémon’s Attack and Speed stats are halved.

scrappy.name: Scrappy
scrappy.description: The Pokémon can hit Ghost-type Pokémon with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.

stormDrain.name: Storm Drain
stormDrain.description: The Pokémon draws in all Water-type moves. These moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Sp. Atk stat.

iceBody.name: Ice Body
iceBody.description: The Pokémon has ¹⁄₁₆ of its max HP restored at the end of every turn in snow or hail. The Pokémon takes no damage from hail if it would otherwise.

solidRock.name: Solid Rock
solidRock.description: Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective moves by 25%.

snowWarning.name: Snow Warning
snowWarning.description: Summons snow for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

honeyGather.name: Honey Gather
honeyGather.description: The Pokémon gathers Honey which is then sold for money after a battle is won, even if it did not participate.

frisk.name: Frisk
frisk.description: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon’s Ability.

reckless.name: Reckless
reckless.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves by 20% if they have recoil or crash damage.

multitype.name: Multitype
multitype.description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the Plate it holds.

flowerGift.name: Flower Gift
flowerGift.description: Boosts the Attack and Sp. Def stats of the Pokémon and its allies next to it in battle by 50% in harsh sunlight.

badDreams.name: Bad Dreams
badDreams.description: Damages opposing Pokémon that are asleep at the end of every turn by ⅛ of their max HP.

pickpocket.name: Pickpocket
pickpocket.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it will steal a held item from the attacker.

sheerForce.name: Sheer Force
sheerForce.description: The Pokémon’s moves lose their additional effects, but the power of those moves will be boosted by 30%.

contrary.name: Contrary
contrary.description: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them — and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.

unnerve.name: Unnerve
unnerve.description: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.

defiant.name: Defiant
defiant.description: When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent, its Attack stat is boosted sharply.

defeatist.name: Defeatist
defeatist.description: Halves the Pokémon’s Attack and Sp. Atk stats when its HP drops to ½ or less.

cursedBody.name: Cursed Body
cursedBody.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, the attacker has a 30% chance to have whichever move it last used disabled for 4 turns.

healer.name: Healer
healer.description: Allies next to the Pokémon in battle have a 50% chance to be cured of their status conditions at the end of every turn.

friendGuard.name: Friend Guard
friendGuard.description: Reduces the damage allies take by 25%.

weakArmor.name: Weak Armor
weakArmor.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, its Defense stat is lowered, but its Speed stat is boosted sharply.

multiscale.name: Multiscale
multiscale.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.

toxicBoost.name: Toxic Boost
toxicBoost.description: When the Pokémon is poisoned or badly poisoned, the power of its physical moves are boosted by 50%.

flareBoost.name: Flare Boost
flareBoost.description: When the Pokémon is burned, the power of its special moves are boosted by 50%.

harvest.name: Harvest
harvest.description: If the Pokémon has used a Berry, it has a 50% chance of creating another one at the end of every turn. In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon is guaranteed to create a Berry.

telepathy.name: Telepathy
telepathy.description: The Pokémon anticipates and dodges the attacks of its allies next to it in battle.

moody.name: Moody
moody.description: At the end of every turn, one of the Pokémon’s stats will be boosted sharply, but another will be lowered. Accuracy and evasiveness are excluded.

overcoat.name: Overcoat
overcoat.description: The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms or hail, and is immune to moves and Abilities involving powder or spores.

poisonTouch.name: Poison Touch
poisonTouch.description: When the Pokémon hits a target with a contact move, the target has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

regenerator.name: Regenerator
regenerator.description: The Pokémon has ⅓ of its max HP restored when it switches out of battle.

bigPecks.name: Big Pecks
bigPecks.description: The Pokémon’s Defense stat cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

sandRush.name: Sand Rush
sandRush.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a sandstorm. The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms if it would otherwise.

wonderSkin.name: Wonder Skin
wonderSkin.description: Lowers the accuracy of status moves used against the Pokémon to 50%.

analytic.name: Analytic
analytic.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s move by 30% when the Pokémon is the last to move that turn.

illusion.name: Illusion
illusion.description: The Pokémon fools opponents by entering battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its party. It reverts to its usual appearance when it takes damage from a move.

imposter.name: Imposter
imposter.description: The Pokémon transforms into the Pokémon in front of it. It also copies all of that Pokémon’s stats apart from its HP. Copied moves have 5 PP each.

infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
infiltrator.description: When using its moves, the Pokémon ignores the effects of targets’ Light Screen, Reflect, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, and substitutes.

mummy.name: Mummy
mummy.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has its Ability changed to Mummy.

moxie.name: Moxie
moxie.description: When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, it shows moxie, which boosts its Attack stat.

justified.name: Justified
justified.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a Dark-type move, its Attack stat is boosted by its sense of justice.

rattled.name: Rattled
rattled.description: The Pokémon gets scared when hit by a Dark-, Ghost-, or Bug-type attack or if intimidated, which boosts its Speed stat.

magicBounce.name: Magic Bounce
magicBounce.description: Instead of being affected by other Pokémon’s status moves, the Pokémon bounces them back at the user.

sapSipper.name: Sap Sipper
sapSipper.description: Grass-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Attack stat.

prankster.name: Prankster
prankster.description: Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s status moves by 1 stage. Dark-type Pokémon are immune to these moves.

sandForce.name: Sand Force
sandForce.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves by 30% in a sandstorm. The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms if it would otherwise.

ironBarbs.name: Iron Barbs
ironBarbs.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, its iron barbs damages the attacker equal to ⅛ of their max HP.

zenMode.name: Zen Mode
zenMode.description: The Pokémon changes its form to Zen Mode when its HP drops to ½ or less.

victoryStar.name: Victory Star
victoryStar.description: The Pokémon and its allies next to it in battle have their accuracy boosted by 10%.

turboblaze.name: Turboblaze
turboblaze.description: The Pokémon’s moves are unaffected by the Ability of the target, with certain exceptions.

teravolt.name: Teravolt
teravolt.description: The Pokémon’s moves are unaffected by the Ability of the target, with certain exceptions.

aromaVeil.name: Aroma Veil
aromaVeil.description: The Pokémon and its allies next to it in battle are protected from Infatuation, Taunt, Torment, Disable, Heal Block, and Encore.

flowerVeil.name: Flower Veil
flowerVeil.description: If the Pokémon or its allies next to it in battle are Grass-type, they are immune to status conditions and cannot have their stats lowered.

cheekPouch.name: Cheek Pouch
cheekPouch.description: The Pokémon has ⅓ of its max HP restored when it eats a Berry, in addition to the Berry’s usual effect.

protean.name: Protean
protean.description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use.

furCoat.name: Fur Coat
furCoat.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from physical moves.

magician.name: Magician
magician.description: The Pokémon steals the held item from any target it hits with a move.

bulletproof.name: Bulletproof
bulletproof.description: The Pokémon is immune to ball and bomb moves.

competitive.name: Competitive
competitive.description: When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted sharply.

strongJaw.name: Strong Jaw
strongJaw.description: The Pokémon’s strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves by 50%.

refrigerate.name: Refrigerate
refrigerate.description: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted by 20%.

sweetVeil.name: Sweet Veil
sweetVeil.description: The Pokémon and its allies next to it in battle cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

stanceChange.name: Stance Change
stanceChange.description: The Pokémon changes into its Blade Forme when it attacks and changes into its Shield Forme when it uses the move King’s Shield.

galeWings.name: Gale Wings
galeWings.description: Increases the priority of the Pokémon’s Flying-type moves by 1 stage while its HP is full.

megaLauncher.name: Mega Launcher
megaLauncher.description: Boosts the power of Aura Sphere and moves with "Pulse" in their names by 50%.

grassPelt.name: Grass Pelt
grassPelt.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat by 50% on Grassy Terrain.

symbiosis.name: Symbiosis
symbiosis.description: When an ally consumes an item, the Pokémon gives its own held item to that ally.

toughClaws.name: Tough Claws
toughClaws.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s contact moves by 30%.

pixilate.name: Pixilate
pixilate.description: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted by 20%.

gooey.name: Gooey
gooey.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s Speed stat is lowered.

aerilate.name: Aerilate
aerilate.description: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted by 20%.

parentalBond.name: Parental Bond
parentalBond.description: The Pokémon strikes twice, with the second strike dealing ¼ of the first attack’s power. Multistrike moves and moves that target multiple Pokémon are ignored.

darkAura.name: Dark Aura
darkAura.description: Boosts the power of the Dark-type moves of all Pokémon on the field by 33%.

fairyAura.name: Fairy Aura
fairyAura.description: Boosts the power of the Fairy-type moves of all Pokémon on the field by 33%.

auraBreak.name: Aura Break
auraBreak.description: The effects of Fairy Aura and Dark Aura are reversed and nullified, causing affected moves to be 25% weaker.

primordialSea.name: Primordial Sea
primordialSea.description: The Pokémon changes the weather to nullify Fire-type attacks.

desolateLand.name: Desolate Land
desolateLand.description: The Pokémon changes the weather to nullify Water-type attacks.

deltaStream.name: Delta Stream
deltaStream.description: The Pokémon changes the weather so that no moves are supereffective against the Flying type.

stamina.name: Stamina
stamina.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, its Defense stat is boosted.

wimpOut.name: Wimp Out
wimpOut.description: The Pokémon cowardly switches out when its HP drops to ½ or less.

emergencyExit.name: Emergency Exit
emergencyExit.description: The Pokémon, sensing danger, switches out when its HP drops to ½ or less.

waterCompaction.name: Water Compaction
waterCompaction.description: Boosts the Defense stat sharply when the Pokémon is hit by a Water-type move.

merciless.name: Merciless
merciless.description: The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

shieldsDown.name: Shields Down
shieldsDown.description: When its HP drops to ½ or less, the Pokémon’s shell breaks and it becomes aggressive.

stakeout.name: Stakeout
stakeout.description: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.

waterBubble.name: Water Bubble
waterBubble.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves and doubles the power of its Water-type moves. The Pokémon cannot be burned.

steelworker.name: Steelworker
steelworker.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Steel-type moves by 50%.

berserk.name: Berserk
berserk.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat when an attack causes its HP to drop to ½ or less of its max.

slushRush.name: Slush Rush
slushRush.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat in snow or hail. The Pokémon takes no damage from hail if it would otherwise.

longReach.name: Long Reach
longReach.description: None of the moves used by the Pokémon are considered contact moves.

liquidVoice.name: Liquid Voice
liquidVoice.description: The Pokémon’s sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

triage.name: Triage
triage.description: Gives priority to the Pokémon’s healing moves.

galvanize.name: Galvanize
galvanize.description: Normal-type moves become Electric-type moves. The power of those moves is boosted by 20%.

surgeSurfer.name: Surge Surfer
surgeSurfer.description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

schooling.name: Schooling
schooling.description: The Pokémon forms a powerful school when it reaches level 20. It stops schooling when its HP drops to ¼ or less.

disguise.name: Disguise
disguise.description: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack at the cost of losing ⅛ of its max HP.

battleBond.name: Battle Bond
battleBond.description: Once per switch-in when the Pokémon knocks out a target, its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats are boosted. If a Greninja has this ability, it instead transforms into Ash-Greninja whenever it knocks out a target.

powerConstruct.name: Power Construct
powerConstruct.description: Cells gather to aid the Pokémon when its HP drops to ½ or less, causing it to change into its Complete Forme.

corrosion.name: Corrosion
corrosion.description: The Pokémon can poison or badly poison targets even if they’re Steel or Poison types.

comatose.name: Comatose
comatose.description: The Pokémon is always drowsing and can attack while in its sleeping state. It is considered under the effects of a status condition.

queenlyMajesty.name: Queenly Majesty
queenlyMajesty.description: The Pokémon’s majesty pressures opponents and makes them unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies next to it in battle.

innardsOut.name: Innards Out
innardsOut.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move that knocks it out, it deals the same amount of damage to the attacker.

dancer.name: Dancer
dancer.description: Whenever a dance move is used in battle, the Pokémon will copy the user to immediately perform that dance move itself.

battery.name: Battery
battery.description: Allies next to the Pokémon in battle have their Sp. Atk increased by 30% when using special moves.

fluffy.name: Fluffy
fluffy.description: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.

dazzling.name: Dazzling
dazzling.description: The Pokémon dazzles its opponents, making them unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies next to it in battle.

soulHeart.name: Soul-Heart
soulHeart.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat every time another Pokémon faints.

tanglingHair.name: Tangling Hair
tanglingHair.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker’s Speed stat is lowered.

receiver.name: Receiver
receiver.description: The Pokémon changes its Ability to match that of a defeated ally in a Double Battle.

powerOfAlchemy.name: Power of Alchemy
powerOfAlchemy.description: The Pokémon changes its Ability to match that of a defeated ally in a Double Battle.

beastBoost.name: Beast Boost
beastBoost.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s most proficient stat every time it knocks out a target.

rksSystem.name: RKS System
rksSystem.description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the memory disc it holds.

electricSurge.name: Electric Surge
electricSurge.description: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

psychicSurge.name: Psychic Surge
psychicSurge.description: Turns the ground into Psychic Terrain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

mistySurge.name: Misty Surge
mistySurge.description: Turns the ground into Misty Terrain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

grassySurge.name: Grassy Surge
grassySurge.description: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

fullMetalBody.name: Full Metal Body
fullMetalBody.description: The Pokémon’s stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities. This effect cannot be ignored.

shadowShield.name: Shadow Shield
shadowShield.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full. This effect cannot be ignored by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

prismArmor.name: Prism Armor
prismArmor.description: Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from supereffective moves by 25%. This effect cannot be ignored by other Pokémon’s moves or Abilities.

neuroforce.name: Neuroforce
neuroforce.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s moves that are super effective against the target by 25%.

intrepidSword.name: Intrepid Sword
intrepidSword.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat when the Pokémon enters a battle.

dauntlessShield.name: Dauntless Shield
dauntlessShield.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat when the Pokémon enters a battle.

libero.name: Libero
libero.description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use.

ballFetch.name: Ball Fetch
ballFetch.description: The Pokémon will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle, even if it did not participate.

cottonDown.name: Cotton Down
cottonDown.description: When the Pokémon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stat of all Pokémon except itself.

propellerTail.name: Propeller Tail
propellerTail.description: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

mirrorArmor.name: Mirror Armor
mirrorArmor.description: Instead of being affected by stat-lowering effects, the Pokémon bounces them back at whichever Pokémon caused them.

gulpMissile.name: Gulp Missile
gulpMissile.description: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it catches prey in its mouth. Taking damage causes the Pokémon to spit its prey at the attacker, dealing ¼ of the their max HP in damage. Depending on the caught prey, it will also lower the opponent’s Defense stat or inflict paralysis.

stalwart.name: Stalwart
stalwart.description: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

steamEngine.name: Steam Engine
steamEngine.description: Boosts the Speed stat by 6 stages when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire- or Water-type move.

punkRock.name: Punk Rock
punkRock.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s sound-based moves by 30%. The Pokémon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves

sandSpit.name: Sand Spit
sandSpit.description: Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon takes damage from moves.

iceScales.name: Ice Scales
iceScales.description: The Pokémon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.

ripen.name: Ripen
ripen.description: Ripens and doubles the effect of berries eaten by the Pokémon.

iceFace.name: Ice Face
iceFace.description: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, the ice will be restored when it begins to snow or hail.

powerSpot.name: Power Spot
powerSpot.description: Allies next to the Pokémon in battle deal 30% increased damage.

mimicry.name: Mimicry
mimicry.description: The Pokémon’s type changes depending on the terrain.

screenCleaner.name: Screen Cleaner
screenCleaner.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

steelySpirit.name: Steely Spirit
steelySpirit.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon and its allies next to it in battle’s Steel-type moves by 50%.

perishBody.name: Perish Body
perishBody.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.

wanderingSpirit.name: Wandering Spirit
wanderingSpirit.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it swaps Abilities with the attacker.

gorillaTactics.name: Gorilla Tactics
gorillaTactics.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat by 50%, but only allows the use of the first selected move.

neutralizingGas.name: Neutralizing Gas
neutralizingGas.description: While the Pokémon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.

pastelVeil.name: Pastel Veil
pastelVeil.description: The Pokémon and its allies next to it in battle are protected from being poisoned or badly poisoned.

hungerSwitch.name: Hunger Switch
hungerSwitch.description: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of every turn.

quickDraw.name: Quick Draw
quickDraw.description: The Pokémon’s moves have a 30% chance of going first among moves of the same priority

unseenFist.name: Unseen Fist
unseenFist.description: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing ¼ of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target’s protective effects is still triggered.

curiousMedicine.name: Curious Medicine
curiousMedicine.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

transistor.name: Transistor
transistor.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Electric-type moves by 30%.

dragonsMaw.name: Dragon’s Maw
dragonsMaw.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Dragon-type moves by 50%.

chillingNeigh.name: Chilling Neigh
chillingNeigh.description: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.

grimNeigh.name: Grim Neigh
grimNeigh.description: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.

asOneGlastrier.name: As One
asOneGlastrier.description: This Ability combines the effects of both Unnerve and Chilling Neigh, preventing opposing Pokémon from consuming berries and boosting the Pokémon’s Attack stat when knocking out a target.

asOneSpectrier.name: As One
asOneSpectrier.description: This Ability combines the effects of both Unnerve and Grim Neigh, preventing opposing Pokémon from consuming berries and boosting the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat when knocking out a target.

lingeringAroma.name: Lingering Aroma
lingeringAroma.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has its Ability changed to Lingering Aroma.

seedSower.name: Seed Sower
seedSower.description: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for 5 turns when the Pokémon takes damage from moves.

thermalExchange.name: Thermal Exchange
thermalExchange.description: Boosts the Attack stat when the Pokémon is hit by a Fire-type move. The Pokémon also cannot be burned.

angerShell.name: Anger Shell
angerShell.description: When an attack causes its HP to drop to ½ or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.

purifyingSalt.name: Purifying Salt
purifyingSalt.description: The Pokémon’s pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

wellBakedBody.name: Well-Baked Body
wellBakedBody.description: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.

windRider.name: Wind Rider
windRider.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokémon is hit by a wind move. The Pokémon also takes no damage from wind moves.

guardDog.name: Guard Dog
guardDog.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.

rockyPayload.name: Rocky Payload
rockyPayload.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Rock-type moves by 50%.

windPower.name: Wind Power
windPower.description: The Pokémon becomes charged when Tailwind takes effect or it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

zeroToHero.name: Zero to Hero
zeroToHero.description: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out of battle.

commander.name: Commander
commander.description: Upon entering battle, the Pokémon goes inside an ally Dondozo if one is on the field and raises all its stats sharply. If this Pokémon is your lead into battle, it raises the likelihood of double battles.

electromorphosis.name: Electromorphosis
electromorphosis.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, the power of the next Electric-type move used by the Pokémon will be doubled.

protosynthesis.name: Protosynthesis
protosynthesis.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s most proficient stat in harsh sunlight by 30%, or 50% if the stat boosted is its Speed stat.

quarkDrive.name: Quark Drive
quarkDrive.description: Boosts the Pokémon’s most proficient stat on Electric Terrain by 30%, or 50% if the stat boosted is its Speed stat.

goodAsGold.name: Good as Gold
goodAsGold.description: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon’s status moves.

vesselOfRuin.name: Vessel of Ruin
vesselOfRuin.description: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself by 25% while on the field.

swordOfRuin.name: Sword of Ruin
swordOfRuin.description: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous sword lowers the Defense stats of all Pokémon except itself by 25% while on the field.

tabletsOfRuin.name: Tablets of Ruin
tabletsOfRuin.description: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous wooden tablets lowers the Attack stats of all Pokémon except itself by 25% while on the field.

beadsOfRuin.name: Beads of Ruin
beadsOfRuin.description: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself by 25% while on the field.

orichalcumPulse.name: Orichalcum Pulse
orichalcumPulse.description: Summons harsh sunlight for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat by 33% in harsh sunlight.

hadronEngine.name: Hadron Engine
hadronEngine.description: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat by 33% on Electric Terrain.

opportunist.name: Opportunist
opportunist.description: When an opponent’s stats are boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost its own stats in the exact same way.

cudChew.name: Cud Chew
cudChew.description: If the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate and eat that same Berry once more at the end of next turn.

sharpness.name: Sharpness
sharpness.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s slicing moves by 50%.

supremeOverlord.name: Supreme Overlord
supremeOverlord.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the power of its moves is boosted by 10% for each Pokémon in its party that has been defeated in battle already. The maximum boost is 50%

costar.name: Costar
costar.description: When the Pokémon enters a double battle, it copies its ally’s stat changes.

toxicDebris.name: Toxic Debris
toxicDebris.description: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

armorTail.name: Armor Tail
armorTail.description: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon’s head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies next to it in battle.

earthEater.name: Earth Eater
earthEater.description: Ground-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore ¼ of its max HP.

myceliumMight.name: Mycelium Might
myceliumMight.description: The Pokémon’s status moves will go last among moves of the same priority, but these moves will be unaffected by the Ability of the target.

mindsEye.name: Mind’s Eye
mindsEye.description: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents’ evasiveness, its accuracy can’t be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

supersweetSyrup.name: Supersweet Syrup
supersweetSyrup.description: A sickly sweet scent spreads across the field when the Pokémon enters a battle, lowering the evasiveness of opposing Pokémon.

hospitality.name: Hospitality
hospitality.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring ¼ of its ally’s max HP.

toxicChain.name: Toxic Chain
toxicChain.description: When the Pokémon hits a target with a move, the target has a 30% chance of being badly poisoned from the power of the Pokémon’s toxic chain.

embodyAspectTeal.name: Embody Aspect
embodyAspectTeal.description: The Pokémon’s heart fills with memories, causing the Teal Mask to shine and the Pokémon’s Speed stat to be boosted.

embodyAspectWellspring.name: Embody Aspect
embodyAspectWellspring.description: The Pokémon’s heart fills with memories, causing the Wellspring Mask to shine and the Pokémon’s Sp. Def stat to be boosted.

embodyAspectHearthflame.name: Embody Aspect
embodyAspectHearthflame.description: The Pokémon’s heart fills with memories, causing the Hearthflame Mask to shine and the Pokémon’s Attack stat to be boosted.

embodyAspectCornerstone.name: Embody Aspect
embodyAspectCornerstone.description: The Pokémon’s heart fills with memories, causing the Cornerstone Mask to shine and the Pokémon’s Defense stat to be boosted.

teraShift.name: Tera Shift
teraShift.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.

teraShell.name: Tera Shell
teraShell.description: The Pokémon’s shell contains the powers of each type. All damage-dealing moves that hit the Pokémon when its HP is full will not be very effective.

teraformZero.name: Teraform Zero
teraformZero.description: The Pokémon uses its hidden powers to eliminate all effects of weather and terrain, reducing them to zero.

poisonPuppeteer.name: Poison Puppeteer
poisonPuppeteer.description: Pokémon poisoned or badly poisoned by this Pokémon’s moves will also become confused.

piercingDrill.name: Piercing Drill
piercingDrill.description: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing ¼ of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target’s protective effects is still triggered.

dragonize.name: Dragonize
dragonize.description: The Pokémon’s Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

megaSol.name: Mega Sol
megaSol.description: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

spicySpray.name: Spicy Spray
spicySpray.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.
